roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOT FOR BAIL HR & ORD RELEASING DEF ON O/R FILED
DEFT'S MOT FOR FORMAL BAIL HRG & ORD REL DEFT ON O/R FILED

/CAL:DISPOSITION/INTORD:SPANISH/INTC/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES  MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THESENTENCE IN COURT NO, 19018180/VD:HEARING DATE OF 03-05-21 IN S-22/

/CAL: TRAILING #19018180/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TRAILING 19018180/DOPU: IN LATINO COMMISSION PROGRAM/

/CAL:TRAILING #19018180/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENTELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 04-01-20/CONTD:MISD, TRAILING ON 05-08-20/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN (FTA 01-30-20 TO JOIN #19018180, 1ST BW)/INTC//BWDNC/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSIONFOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORTON 02-10-20/CONTD: TRAILING #19018180 ON 03-20-20/DOP/
